suite.name: 01 Installation

kw.name: Prepare Test Environment
Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Remove File
kw.doc: Removes a file with the given path.
Ensures clean baseline before suite execution.

test.name: TC-001 Install Satellite Telemetry Package

kw.name: Install Debian Package
File Should Exist
kw.doc: Fails unless the given ``path`` points to an existing file.

kw.name: Run Process
kw.doc: Runs a process and waits for it to complete.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: dpkg install output: Selecting previously unselected package satellite-telemetry. (Reading database ... 8827 files and directories currently installed.) Preparing to unpack .../satellite-telemetry_1.0.0_all.deb ... Unpacking satellite-telemetry (1.0.0) ... Setting up satellite-telemetry (1.0.0) ... [POSTINST] satellite-telemetry package installation configured successfully.
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.
Installs a local Debian .deb package using dpkg.

kw.name: Package Should Be Installed
kw.doc: Verifies that a Debian package is installed on the Linux host using dpkg-query.

test.doc: Validate clean installation of the Debian package v1.0.0.

test.name: TC-002 Validate Installed Version

kw.name: Installed Package Version Should Be
Get Installed Package Version
kw.doc: Returns the version string of an installed Debian package.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.
Verifies installed package version matches expected value.

test.doc: Verify installed package version matches expected baseline version 1.0.0.

test.name: TC-003 Validate Installed Files Structure

kw.name: Validate Package Files Installed
File Should Exist
kw.doc: Fails unless the given ``path`` points to an existing file.

kw.name: File Should Exist
kw.doc: Fails unless the given ``path`` points to an existing file.

kw.name: File Should Exist
kw.doc: Fails unless the given ``path`` points to an existing file.

kw.name: Directory Should Exist
kw.doc: Fails unless the given path points to an existing directory.
Verifies expected binaries and directories are present after installation.

test.doc: Verify presence of executables, configuration files, and log directories.

kw.name: Restore Test Environment
Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Stop Service
kw.msg: No keyword with name 'Stop Service' found.
kw.status: No keyword with name 'Stop Service' found.

kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.
Cleans up any running processes or temporary artifacts.

suite.doc: Suite for validating Debian package installation and initial file structure.

suite.name: 02 Dependencies

test.name: TC-004 Validate Package Dependencies Requirement

kw.name: Package Should Have Declared Dependency
Get Package Dependencies
kw.doc: Extracts declared dependencies from a .deb package control metadata.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.
Validates that a package metadata declares expected dependency.

kw.name: Package Should Have Declared Dependency
Get Package Dependencies
kw.doc: Extracts declared dependencies from a .deb package control metadata.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.
Validates that a package metadata declares expected dependency.

test.doc: Verify package metadata declares mandatory dependencies (python3, curl).

kw.name: Get Package Dependencies
kw.doc: Extracts declared dependencies from a .deb package control metadata.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.msg: Verified dependency check enforcement logic for satellite-telemetry.
kw.arg: Verified dependency check enforcement logic for ${PACKAGE_NAME}.

test.doc: Simulates package manager behavior when evaluating dependencies.

test.name: TC-008 Health Endpoint Validation

kw.name: Query Health Endpoint
Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=telemetry_session, url=http://127.0.0.1:8080, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
GET On Session
kw.msg: ConnectionError: HTTPConnectionPool(host='127.0.0.1', port=8080): Max retries exceeded with url: /health (Caused by ProtocolError('Connection aborted.', RemoteDisconnected('Remote end closed connection without response')))
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

Verifies installed package version matches expected value.

test.doc: Upgrade installed package from 1.0.0 to 1.1.0 via dpkg -i.

test.name: TC-011 Validate Configuration Preservation After Upgrade

kw.name: Run Process
kw.doc: Runs a process and waits for it to complete.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: dpkg install output: (Reading database ... 8831 files and directories currently installed.) Preparing to unpack .../satellite-telemetry_1.1.0_all.deb ... Unpacking satellite-telemetry (1.1.0) over (1.1.0) ... Setting up satellite-telemetry (1.1.0) ... [POSTINST] satellite-telemetry package v1.1.0 configured successfully.
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Stop Service
Run Process
kw.doc: Runs a process and waits for it to complete.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: Service stop output: Stopping satellite-telemetry... satellite-telemetry is not running.
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Stops the specified Linux service.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.
Cleans up any running processes or temporary artifacts.

suite.doc: Suite for Debian package upgrade testing and config file preservation.

suite.name: 08 Removal

test.name: TC-012 Validate Clean Package Removal

kw.name: Install Debian Package
File Should Exist
kw.doc: Fails unless the given ``path`` points to an existing file.

kw.name: Run Process
kw.doc: Runs a process and waits for it to complete.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: dpkg install output: dpkg: warning: downgrading satellite-telemetry from 1.1.0 to 1.0.0 (Reading database ... 8831 files and directories currently installed.) Preparing to unpack .../satellite-telemetry_1.0.0_all.deb ... Unpacking satellite-telemetry (1.0.0) over (1.1.0) ... Setting up satellite-telemetry (1.0.0) ... Installing new version of config file /etc/satellite-telemetry/config.json ... [POSTINST] satellite-telemetry package installation configured successfully.
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.
Installs a local Debian .deb package using dpkg.

kw.name: Package Should Be Installed
kw.doc: Verifies that a Debian package is installed on the Linux host using dpkg-query.

kw.name: Remove Debian Package
Run Process
kw.doc: Runs a process and waits for it to complete.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: dpkg purge output: (Reading database ... 8831 files and directories currently installed.) Removing satellite-telemetry (1.0.0) ... Stopping satellite-telemetry... satellite-telemetry is not running. [PRERM] satellite-telemetry service stopped for removal. Purging configuration files for satellite-telemetry (1.0.0) ...
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.
Purges a Debian package from the Linux environment.

kw.name: Package Should Not Be Installed
kw.doc: Verifies that a Debian package is not installed on the system.

kw.name: Validate Package Files Removed
File Should Not Exist
kw.doc: Fails if the given path points to an existing file.

kw.name: File Should Not Exist
kw.doc: Fails if the given path points to an existing file.
Verifies binaries and configuration files are removed after package purge.

test.doc: Purge package using dpkg -P and verify binaries and init scripts are removed.

suite.doc: Suite for package removal/purge testing and clean filesystem validation.
